name: Darktrace
description: This app integrates with Darktrace to perform investigative and containment actions

auth_config.note: Darktrace uses HMAC: DTAPI-Token + DTAPI-Date + signature

actions.name: Get Device Tags
actions.description: Receive all of the tags that are currently applied to a device

parameters.name: device_id
parameters.description: See artifact details to get the device_ID

actions.name: Get Tagged Devices
actions.description: Receive all of the devices that currently have a given tag

parameters.name: tag
parameters.description: The name of an existing tag

actions.name: Get Breach Comments
actions.description: Receive all comments made on a model breach

parameters.name: model_breach_id
parameters.description: See artifact details to get the model_breach_id

actions.name: On Poll
actions.description: Ingests Darktrace model breaches and Cyber AI Analyst investigations

parameters.name: artifact_count
parameters.description: Maximum number of artifact records to query for

parameters.name: container_count
parameters.description: Maximum number of container records to query for

parameters.name: container_id
parameters.description: Container IDs to limit the ingestion to

parameters.name: end_time
parameters.description: End of the time range, in epoch time (milliseconds)

parameters.name: start_time
parameters.description: Start of the time range, in epoch time (milliseconds)

actions.name: Get Device Description
actions.description: Receive device description for the specified device

parameters.name: device_id
parameters.description: See artifact details to get the device_id

actions.name: Get Device Modelbreaches
actions.description: Receive recent model breaches for the specified device

parameters.name: device_id
parameters.description: See artifact details to get the device_id

parameters.name: model_breach_id
parameters.description: See artifact details to get the model_breach_id

parameters.name: model_breach_id
parameters.description: See artifact details to get the model_breach_id

actions.name: Post Comment
actions.description: Post a comment to a model breach

parameters.name: model_breach_id
parameters.description: See artifact details to get the model_breach_id

actions.name: Post Tag
actions.description: Post a tag to a device

parameters.name: device_id
parameters.description: See artifact details to get the device_id

parameters.name: duration
parameters.description: How long this tag be applied for (seconds). Ex: enter 3600 for 1 hour. Leave this entry empty if you do not want it to expire

parameters.name: tag
parameters.description: Choose a tag to apply to the device

actions.name: Get Breach Connections
actions.description: Receive connections involved in a model breach

parameters.name: model_breach_id
parameters.description: See artifact details to get the model_breach_id
